name: io.github.entire-vc/evc-team-relay-mcp
description: MCP server for AI agent read/write access to Obsidian vaults via EVC Team Relay.

environmentVariables.name: RELAY_CP_URL
environmentVariables.description: URL of the Team Relay control plane (e.g. https://cp.yourdomain.com)

environmentVariables.name: RELAY_AGENT_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Agent key for single-share access (mutually exclusive with RELAY_AGENT_KEYS). Overrides RELAY_EMAIL/RELAY_PASSWORD.

environmentVariables.name: RELAY_AGENT_KEYS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated share_id:key pairs for multi-share access (e.g. mesh:key1,spark:key2). Takes priority over RELAY_AGENT_KEY for matched shares.

environmentVariables.name: RELAY_EMAIL
environmentVariables.description: Email for password auth (fallback when no agent key is configured)

environmentVariables.name: RELAY_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: Password for auth (fallback when no agent key is configured)
